what: Custom Triton flash-decoding kernel with MXFP4 KV cache dequant fused into attention (4x bandwidth savings)
why: Top 2 competitors achieve 4.3us vs our 23.3us. MXFP4 KV cache provides 4x memory bandwidth reduction. Fusing fp4 dequant into attention computation avoids materializing bf16 intermediate. This is a fundamentally different approach from tuning aiter ASM parameters.

what: MXFP4 Triton kernel v2: per-head processing, optimized fp4 dequant
why: v110 proved MXFP4 Triton works (all tests pass, max error 0.00027) but was 5.5x slower. Main bottlenecks: 16-head parallel register pressure, nested tl.where dequant, masked row extraction. Fix: process 1 head per program, use optimized fp4 decode.
override: v110 proved feasibility but had 5.5x regression. This is a fundamentally different kernel structure (per-head vs all-heads) with optimized dequant.
